texto: Business is a game like baseball or golf or anything else. I enjoy being a student of the game, and reading, and learning, and going to conferences, whether it’s building custom homes or selling or servicing medical equipment. A good entrepreneur can be a good entrepreneur in any industry because if you’re a good student of the game, the rules and the lessons are very much the same. And that’s the fun part about it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ryan Diest: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “Business is a game like baseball or golf or anything else. I enjoy being a student of the game, a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, business-advice, entrepreneurship pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de entrepreneurship.
